creator: cullum@sacredheartsc.com
text:
The current Makefile for nomad does not build the web interface. This can be fixed with the following small patch to the Makefile:

-       ${SETENV} ${BUILD_ENV} GOPATH=${WRKSRC} go build -v -x \
+       ${SETENV} ${BUILD_ENV} GOPATH=${WRKSRC} go build -v -x -tags ui \
